General.Name: Kko International SA
General.Description: KKO International SA engages in the chocolate manufacturing business in Ivory Coast. It is involved in the plantation and production of cocoa. The company was formerly known as Solea Holding International and changed its name to KKO International SA in April 2015. KKO International SA was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Paris, France.

2.Name: Mr. Indranil  Ghosh
2.Title: Deputy MD, Sustainability Lead & Vice Chairman
